title: Other costs prohibited, city and state not liable
doc_html:
§1376.  Other costs prohibited, city and state not liable

No costs shall be charged by the clerk other than those specified in R.S. 13:1381.  Neither the state nor the city of New Orleans shall be liable or responsible for any costs of the clerk in criminal cases.
doc_text:
